purpose: Implement the first Phase 10 adapter slice by allowing abilityMeta.reactionRules metadata to register into the existing ReactionRegistry and flow through ReactionEngine.
implementationScope: Read abilityMeta.reactionRules from owned feat/talent items.
Normalize metadata-backed rules into ReactionRegistry-compatible definitions.
Register metadata-backed definitions through the existing ReactionRegistry.
Expose metadata-backed reaction keys to ReactionEngine.getAvailableReactions().
Ensure resolveReaction() can resolve metadata-backed reactions for the defender before registry lookup.
Provide a safe metadata-backed handler that posts/manual-surfaces unsupported effects without direct actor mutation.
nonGoals: No full implementation of every individual reaction feat in this slice.
No movement-grid, incoming-damage, or target-effect mutation behavior yet.
unlocksPhase9Families: reactionRules metadata no longer silently disappears
once-per-round and once-per-encounter reaction limits through existing ReactionEngine / ActivationLimitEngine
manual-resolution chat path for unsupported reaction effects
remainingWork: Add dedicated handlers for reactions that mutate damage, movement, conditions, or target state.
Add event producers for incoming attack missed, incoming damage taken, and post-hit events where not already emitted.
Promote individual feats only after their handler/effect behavior is implemented and tested.
